_comment: Credit roster for the badge AboutCredits screen + companion
MicroPython app. Order here is render order top-to-bottom.
Schema is person-centric: each entry under `people` declares the
metadata that's shared across all of that person's headshots
(name, position, company, website, bio) plus an `images` list of
one or more variants. The screen pools every variant of a person
into one card slot and randomly picks among them every time the
slot scrolls into view — so the displayed name + company never
changes as the photo rotates.
Person fields:
name        required  display name (large font; embed '\n' to wrap)
position    optional  job title (small line under the name)
company     optional  affiliation (small line)
website     optional  url / handle; leading https:// is stripped
bio         optional  free-form text (wraps to fill remaining space)
group       optional  pool key. Defaults to `name`. Set explicitly
only if you want two people with different
names to share one card slot.
images      required  list of image specs (see below)
Image fields (per variant; nothing here changes a person's metadata):
file        optional  image filename inside assets/credits/. Used
as the dither source.
prebinned   optional  string filename or directory under
assets/credits/prebinned/. A '.bin' resolves
to a single 64×64 frame; a directory becomes
an animation (frames sorted alphabetically,
per-frame delays parsed from `_delay-Xs`
tokens in the filenames). Pass `true` to
auto-detect a same-stemmed .bin alongside
the source image.
dither      optional  one of: floyd (default), atkinson, bayer4,
bayer8, threshold, none. Object form lets
you tune knobs alongside the mode.
contrast    optional  PIL autocontrast cutoff %% (0..49, default 2)
brightness  optional  pixel multiplier (default 1.0; >1 brightens)
threshold   optional  only for dither=threshold (0..255, default 128)
speed       optional  animation speed multiplier (default 1.0;
0.5 = half speed / each frame held twice as long)
loop_blank  optional  when true, the loop-end pause renders an empty
cell instead of holding the last frame
random_transform  optional  when true, the screen picks a fresh random
rotation+flip every time the animation loops
weight      optional  weighted-random pool selection. Defaults: 3 for
animated entries, 1 for static; explicit values
override either default.
Each image must supply at least one of `file` / `prebinned`. Image
files in assets/credits/ and .bin files in assets/credits/prebinned/
that no person references are reported at the end of a bake but are
never auto-added to the roster — credits.json is authoritative.
Run `python3 scripts/gen_credit_xbms.py --preview` to dump per-credit
comparison sheets to assets/credits/preview/ for A/B-ing dither modes.
